message:
fix(useOperatorSession): pass completed session to onComplete callback

Previously, when result was undefined, onComplete was called with the
old session state before the COMPLETE dispatch. React state updates are
async, so the session variable still held the pre-completion state.

Now we always build the completedSession object manually before calling
the callback, ensuring the callback receives the correct completed state.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
